testing_centers.notes: Available at Certiport Authorized Testing Centers (primarily academic)

id_requirements: One valid, government-issued photo ID. Name on ID must match registration. For online: webcam required, room must be clear of people and materials.
exam_rules: No notes, books, or study materials. No phones or smartwatches. Whiteboard or scratch paper may be provided by testing center. Online: no dual monitors, no virtual machines, no headphones, must be alone in a closed room.
renewal_options: Microsoft certifications (Associate/Expert/Specialty) are renewed annually for free via a short renewal assessment on Microsoft Learn. Renewal assessment available 6 months before expiry. Fundamentals certifications do not expire.
target_audience: As a Power BI data analyst, you work closely with business stakeholders to identify business requirements. You collaborate with analytics engineers and data engineers to identify and acquire data.
recommended_experience: Proficient at using Power Query and Data Analysis Expressions (DAX).

prerequisites.description: Provide meaningful business value through easy-to-comprehend data visualizations. Enable others to perform self-service analytics.

retake_policy.notes: No waiting period for first retake if score >= 500 on failed attempt. If score < 500: 14-day waiting period before retake. Maximum 5 attempts per exam per year (365 days). Free retake voucher sometimes included in official instructor-led training.

objectives.title: Get or connect to data
sub_objectives: Identify and connect to data sources or a shared semantic model
Change data source settings, including credentials and privacy levels
Choose between DirectLake, DirectQuery, and Import

objectives.title: Profile and clean the data
sub_objectives: Evaluate data, including data statistics and column properties
Resolve inconsistencies, unexpected or null values, and data quality issues

objectives.title: Transform and load the data
sub_objectives: Convert semi-structured data to a table
Create fact tables and dimension tables
Identify when to use reference or duplicate queries and the resulting impact
Identify and create appropriate keys for relationships

objectives.title: Design and implement a data model
sub_objectives: Define a relationship's cardinality and cross-filter direction
Identify use cases for calculated columns and calculated tables
Create model calculations by using DAX
Create a measure by using quick measures
Improve performance by identifying and removing unnecessary rows and columns
Identify poorly performing measures, relationships, and visuals by using Performance Analyzer and DAX query view

objectives.title: Create reports
sub_objectives: Create a narrative visual with Copilot
Use Copilot to create a new report page
Use Copilot to suggest content for a new report page
Choose when to use a paginated report
Create visual calculations by using DAX
Enhance reports for usability and storytelling
Edit and configure interactions between visuals
Group and layer visuals by using the Selection pane
Configure drillthrough navigation, including pages, filters, and buttons
Enable personalization in a report, including personalized visuals
Design and configure Power BI reports for accessibility
Use the Analyze feature in Power BI
Use reference lines, error bars, and forecasting
Use Copilot to summarize the underlying semantic model

objectives.title: Create and manage workspaces and assets
sub_objectives: Publish, import, or update items in a workspace
Promote or certify Power BI content
Identify when a gateway is required
Configure a semantic model scheduled refresh

objectives.title: Secure and govern Power BI items

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Learn (free self-paced training)
official_study_resources.notes: Free official learning paths mapped to each exam

official_study_resources.title: Microsoft Official Practice Assessment
official_study_resources.notes: Free official practice questions on Microsoft Learn
